evals.name: brand_config_html
evals.prompt: Generate a styled HTML template using our brand-config.json
expectations: Loads brand tokens from brand-config.json
Injects CSS custom properties into :root
Uses var() references instead of hex literals
Includes hero header with brand-primary border

evals.name: component_library
evals.prompt: Show me the available components in the design system
expectations: Lists all component classes (card, badge, callout, etc.)
Includes semantic color usage rules
Covers severity levels with correct colors (low=yellow)
References component snippets for HTML usage

evals.name: neutral_defaults
evals.prompt: Apply design system to a report without any brand config
expectations: Uses neutral blue defaults when no brand-config.json exists
All tokens have fallback values
Maintains WCAG AA contrast ratios
Includes responsive breakpoints

evals.name: validate_colors
evals.prompt: Validate that all colors in dashboard.html match the token reference
expectations: Checks for hex literals outside :root block
Verifies semantic colors are correctly applied
Confirms positive state uses yellow not green
Reports any WCAG contrast violations

evals.name: dark_brand_edge_case
evals.prompt: Configure brand colors for a client whose primary color is very dark (#1A1A2E)
expectations: Adapts hover states using brand-light derivative
Ensures contrast on dark hero sections
Maintains readability for all text elements
Documents edge case adaptation in output
